questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #3 regarding events for easy difficulty?
[FALLBACK] Recent news Item #5 regarding events for easy difficulty?
Who wrote the national anthem of India?
What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 2700 at an interest rate of 12% per annum over 4 years?
Find the next number in the series: 14, 18, 22, 26, 30, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 4. So, 30 + (4) = 34.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 10 days while B can complete the same work in 15 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 10 * 15 = 150. Rate = 10 + 15 = 25. Time = Work / Rate = 6 days.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 4, 12, 36, 108, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 3. So, 108 * 3 = 324.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #2 regarding events for easy difficulty?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 122, 64, 49, 36
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #1 regarding events for easy difficulty?
Which is the longest river in the world?
Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who was the first President of India?
[FALLBACK] Recent news Item #6 regarding events for easy difficulty?

Statements:
1. All Cars are Trucks.
2. All Trucks are Vehicles.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: A train travels at an average speed of 119 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 2 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question: What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 23, 25, 27, 29, 31?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.
